## Safety

- [ ] No credential, model, recording, map, runtime state or virtual environment is included.
- [ ] This change cannot start physical motion, or its motion/HIL evidence is linked and reviewed.
- [ ] Transform/frame version effects are documented.
- [ ] `bash hub/scripts/verify_repository.sh --tests` passes.
